errors.email_already_registered: An account already exists with this email address.
errors.email_not_verified: You must verify your email before signing in.
errors.invalid_credentials: The email or password is incorrect.
errors.invalid_form: Review the information you entered and try again.
errors.invalid_reset_token: The recovery link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one.
errors.network_error: We could not connect to the authentication service. Try again.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment before trying again.
errors.unknown_error: We could not complete the request. Try again.
errors.user_banned: Your account is blocked and cannot access the platform.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in and get your matchday predictions ready.

metadata.title: Recover password — Quiniela FUTVE
metadata.description: Request a link to recover access to Quiniela FUTVE.

forgotPassword.title: Recover your access
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your account email and we'll send you a link to get back in the match.

metadata.title: Check your email — Quiniela FUTVE
metadata.description: We sent you a link to reset your password.

forgotPasswordSent.title: Check your email
forgotPasswordSent.subtitle: We sent you a link to reset your password. Open it from your inbox and get back to setting up your predictions.
forgotPasswordSent.note: If it does not show up in a few minutes, check spam or promotions. Sometimes the perfect pass takes a moment to arrive.

metadata.title: Create a new password — Quiniela FUTVE
metadata.description: Create a new password to recover access to Quiniela FUTVE.

resetPassword.title: Create a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a secure password that you do not use for other services.

invalid.title: This link is no longer valid
invalid.subtitle: This recovery link is invalid, has already been used, or has expired.
invalid.note: Request a new link and open the most recent email you receive.

metadata.title: Password updated — Quiniela FUTVE
metadata.description: Your Quiniela FUTVE password was updated successfully.

resetPasswordSuccess.title: Password updated!
resetPasswordSuccess.subtitle: You can now access your account with your new password.
resetPasswordSuccess.note: For security, sign in again with your updated credentials.

metadata.title: Create account — Quiniela FUTVE
metadata.description: Create a free account to play Liga FUTVE pools.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Join for free and start competing with your friends.
register.passwordTitle: Use at least 8 characters, one uppercase letter, and one number.
register.terms: By signing up, you accept the

metadata.title: Verify your email — Quiniela FUTVE
metadata.description: Confirm your email to activate your Quiniela FUTVE account.

verifyEmail.title: You're on the squad list!
verifyEmail.subtitle: Thanks for signing up. We sent you an email to verify your account. Click the link and you'll be ready to enter the platform.
verifyEmail.note: The link can take a few minutes to arrive. Check spam or promotions if you do not see it in your main inbox.

metadata.title: Verification result — Quiniela FUTVE
metadata.description: The result of your Quiniela FUTVE email verification.

success.title: Email verified!
success.subtitle: Your account was activated successfully. You can now sign in and access the platform.
success.note: Verification is complete. Use the same email and password you registered with.

error.title: We could not verify your email
error.subtitle: The link is invalid, has already been used, or expired before verification was completed.
error.note: Sign in again to check your account status. If the email was already verified, you will be able to access normally.

emailVerification.subject: Verify your email — Quiniela FUTVE
emailVerification.preheader: Confirm your email to activate your account and start playing in Quiniela FUTVE.
emailVerification.heading: You're on the squad list
emailVerification.body: Confirm your email to activate the account. Then you can sign in, submit your predictions, and compete with your friends.
emailVerification.noteBody: this link expires for security. If you did not create a Quiniela FUTVE account, you can ignore this message.
emailVerification.fallbackInstructions: If the button does not work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
emailVerification.footer: This email was sent automatically by Quiniela FUTVE. Do not reply to this message.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your password — Quiniela FUTVE
passwordReset.preheader: Use this secure link to create a new password for Quiniela FUTVE.
passwordReset.heading: Recover your access
passwordReset.body: We received a request to change your account password. Use the following link to create a new one and get back in the game.
passwordReset.noteBody: You can ignore this message. Your current password will continue to work and no changes will be made.
passwordReset.fallbackInstructions: This link expires for security. If the button does not work, copy and paste this address:
passwordReset.footer: This email was sent automatically by Quiniela FUTVE. Do not reply to this message.
